column2: How confident do you feel using online services and apps in general?
column3: When an online service runs slowly or goes down, how much does it affect you?
column4: How important is it to you that the online services you use are fast and always available?
column5: How much do you trust that your online service provider manages their systems responsibly to keep things running smoothly?
column6: How important is it to you that the technology companies you rely on are using their computing resources efficiently and sustainably? For example: not running unnecessary servers that waste energy
column7: Overall, how satisfied are you with the reliability of the online services you use most?
